Lavender Floral Spray

✓ In Stock

A gentle pillow or room spray for a calming aroma or atmosphere — spray before retiring for the day.

Product Options

100ml — $10

Ingredients

Purified Water, Lavender Essential Oil (Lavandula angustifolia) and Polysorbate 80

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Magnesium Chloride Flakes

✓ In Stock

A restorative bath soak or a simple foot soak — rich in magnesium to complement your daily wellbeing.

Product Options

350g — $10

Ingredients

Magnesium Chloride Flakes

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

Herbal Eye Pillow

✓ In Stock

Washable and refillable herbal eye pillow filled with flaxseeds and calming herbs — perfect for relaxation, meditation or for gentle relaxation of the eye area. Store in the fridge in a ziplock bag for a cooling compress, or use at room temperature — naturally ground botanicals release a gentle, calming aroma.

Product Options

1 pillow — $20

Ingredients

Ground Flaxseed (Linum usitatissimum), Ground Lavender (Lavandula angustifolia), Ground Rosemary (Salvia rosmarinus) and Ground Peppermint (Mentha × piperita)

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
